series_metadata.series_description: All records relating to payment cardholder accounts, including: payment cardholder applications, information forms, agreements, change requests, and any other records that relate to the payment cardholder account. This does not include transactional documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 years after the card is inactivated, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
